description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, dressed in a sleeveless athletic tank top and a pair of sporty shorts with side stripes. The figure is barefoot and stands with a slight forward lean, head bowed and arms relaxed at the sides. The skin is smooth and the musculature is well-defined, especially in the arms and legs. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, with no visible facial hair or accessories. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the athletic physique. No additional objects or accessories are visible on the person.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless athletic tank top and sporty shorts, barefoot and standing with a forward lean. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a well-defined build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face angled downward, muscular arms, and the front of the tank top and shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm, side profile of the torso, and the side stripes on the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, back of the tank top, and both legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm, side of the torso, and the shorts' stripes.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear consisting of a sleeveless tank top and sporty shorts with side stripes
attribute_posture: standing with a forward lean and head bowed
